headline: Argan Surges 92% in 6 Months: Should Investors Still Buy the Stock?
summary: AGX sees strong backlog growth and rising power demand. Can its premium valuation still support future upside?

headline: Jacobs to hold its fiscal second quarter 2026 earnings conference call and webcast
summary: DALLAS, April 14, 2026--Jacobs (NYSE: J) plans to release its fiscal second quarter 2026 earnings results after market close on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, and will host a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET, during which management will make a presentation focusing on the company’s results and operating trends.

headline: Jacobs : to lead clean energy planning for Maine port electrification project
summary: Jacobs has been selected by the Maine Department of Transportation to provide consulting services for the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency Clean Ports Grant - funded Maine Port Electrification...
